name: Zhejiang Entive Smart Kitchen Appliance Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Entive Smart Kitchen Appliance Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of kitchen appliances and stainless-steel cabinet products. Its products include integrated steaming, steamer, disinfection cabinet, oven, and dishwasher stoves, as well as cupboard and dishwasher integrated sinks, and built-in steam ovens, etc. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Shaoxing, China.
